required_artifacts.schema_absence_reason: Markdown is the immutable natural-language source; source_snapshot_manifest binds its hash and source_snapshot validator checks it.
FINAL_DRD.md is a Markdown compilation target; compiler manifest, hash index, and conservation report provide structured validation.
Final review target is a review-binding object; final_review_decision and spec_validator bind the reviewed subject hash.

implementation_guardrail: These artifacts may be created by implementation workpacks only after P2_SPEC_LOCK exists.
